candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue line; matches total sales/revenue concept directly.
Also a top-line revenue total, but duplicates Revenue in the preview; useful as lower-priority fallback.
This is a cost line, not revenue.
Non-operating/special income, not top-line revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement revenue.

candidates.row_label: Prepayments received from customers and deferred revenue
candidates.why: Balance sheet liability, not reported revenue.

variables.notes: Using revenue lines as a priority list; they are duplicates in the preview, so later code should take the first available value.

candidates.why: Direct costs tied to revenue are the closest match to cost of goods sold / cost of sales.

variables.notes: Direct production/service cost line clearly identified.

candidates.why: Operating overhead personnel cost; appropriate SG&A component.
Operating overhead bucket and appropriate SG&A component.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the best overhead component rows and excluded direct costs, depreciation/amortization, special items, and finance items. No dedicated R&D line appears in the statement.
No dedicated research and development expense line is visible in the provided income statement preview.

candidates.why: Total finance cost line, but includes exchange losses and other non-interest items; less preferred than components.
Primary recurring interest expense line; best direct match.
Recurring lease-related interest expense; should be included with interest costs.
Potentially recurring finance cost component; preferable to total finance expenses if no evidence it is non-recurring valuation/FX.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease interest; avoid double counting since the main statement already has lease interest.
Balance sheet liability, not interest expense.

variables.notes: Used granular recurring finance cost components instead of total Financial expenses to avoid including FX losses and fair value adjustments. Excluded the supplemental lease-interest row as it duplicates the main statement line.

candidates.why: Income statement/OCI allocation line, not balance sheet equity.
Best available shareholders' equity line and preferable to Total Equity when no non-controlling interest line is shown.
Valid equity total, but less preferred because BE should exclude NCI when possible.
Shareholder count, not book equity.
Balancing row, not substantive equity measure.
Balancing row, not substantive equity measure.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: Preferred Shareholders' Equity - Total as the best book equity measure. Included Total Equity as lower-priority fallback in case labels vary across years. No non-controlling interests line is visible.
No minority interest / non-controlling interests row appears in the balance sheet preview.
